content.requirement: Cookie consent gate for non-essential scripts when primaryMarkets includes eu or uk
compareSteps: If primaryMarkets includes eu/uk: scan for consent banner component or script gate
Flag analytics/ads scripts loading before consent in layout/root
Advisory only—user declares markets; engine does not geolocate
content.remediationDirective: Implement consent banner; defer non-essential scripts until consent granted; document essential auth cookies separately.
